product: Change the owner of standalone pipeline streaming tables and materialized views
tagline: June 23, 2026 You can now use ALTER STREAMING TABLE and ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW with SET OWNER TO to change the owner of streaming tables and materialized views backed by standalone pipelines created
what_it_does: June 23, 2026 You can now use ALTER STREAMING TABLE and ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW with SET OWNER TO to change the owner of streaming tables and materialized views backed by standalone pipelines created in Databricks SQL. See [Use ALTER statements with pipeline datasets](/aws/en/ldp/using alter sql).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 23, 2026 You
capabilities.desc: June 23, 2026 You can now use ALTER STREAMING TABLE and ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW with SET OWNER TO to change the owner of streaming

key_takeaway: June 23, 2026 You can now use ALTER STREAMING TABLE and ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW with SET OWNER TO to change the owner of streaming tables and materialized views backed by standalone pipelines created
